title: AP Max
description: Maximum AP refreshed at start of turn.

title: AP Current
description: Spendable AP during active turn.

title: Turn Number
description: Global or encounter turn counter.

title: Active Turn
description: True while this unit is the active combatant.

title: Basic Attack Used This Turn
description: Enforces one free basic attack per turn.

title: Cards Played This Turn
description: Serialized list of card action IDs played this turn.

title: Card Play Locked
description: Prevents play when outside valid turn state.

title: Species
description: Character species label.

title: Forged Heritage
description: Heritage branch: Ironhold, Wire Market, Ashlands, Unaligned.

title: Integrated Resistance
description: Damage resistance selected at character creation.

title: Augmentation Slot 1
description: Primary augmentation selected at level 1.

title: Augmentation Slot 2
description: Secondary augmentation selected at level 5.

title: Maintenance State
description: Tracks maintenance dependency: serviced or degraded.

title: Chassis Intact
description: Enables Forged Resilience death-save bonus logic.

title: Forged Resilience Used
description: Once-per-long-rest tracker.

title: Carry Capacity Multiplier
description: Set to 2 when Hydraulic Frame is active.

title: Unarmed Damage Die
description: Raised to 1d6 when Reinforced Limb is active.

title: Darkvision Range
description: 60 or 90 extension when Optical Suite is active.

title: Natural AC Base
description: Set to 13 when Subdermal Plating is active.

title: Ready Bonus Uses
description: Set to 1 per short rest when Neural Accelerator is active.

title: Poison Save Advantage
description: Enabled by Intake Filter.

title: Poison Resistance
description: Enabled by Intake Filter.

title: Chassis Memory Window Hours
description: Memory recall window from Chassis Memory.

title: Class
description: Character class label.

title: Vein Oath
description: Loyalty, Restraint, Sacrifice, or Clarity.

title: Resonance Fracture
description: Set true when character violates Vein Oath.

title: Vein Discipline L1
description: Between Stance or Iron Breath.

title: Vein Discipline L2
description: Stillness Kata, Burden Strike, or Iron Witness.

title: Vein Path
description: Selected subclass path.

title: Resonant Surge Uses
description: Uses per short rest, 2 at level 20.

title: Perfect Kata Used
description: Once-per-long-rest tracker.

title: Iron Endurance Used
description: Once-per-long-rest tracker for drop-to-1 effect.

title: Iron Endurance Resistance Type
description: Slashing, piercing, or bludgeoning selection.

title: Resonant Armor Reaction Uses
description: Equals proficiency bonus per long rest when unlocked.

title: Surge Bonus Damage Dice
description: 3d6 at level 16 with Between Mastery.

title: Blade-Sworn Bound Weapon
description: Tracks permanent weapon bond at level 17.

title: Seventh Vein Defined
description: Tracks level 20 narrative definition completion.

title: Monster Role
description: Archetypal role: skirmisher, brute, controller, support, boss.

title: Monster Tier
description: minion, standard, elite, boss.

title: Monster AP Max
description: AP refreshed at monster turn start.

title: Monster AP Current
description: AP available for card play on current turn.

title: Monster Basic Attack Used This Turn
description: Enforces one free basic attack card per monster turn.

title: Monster Cards Played This Turn
description: Serialized list of monster card IDs played this turn.

title: Threat State
description: neutral, pressured, advantaged, desperate.

title: Target Lock
description: Current preferred target identifier.

title: Reaction Card Used
description: Optional once-per-round reaction limiter.

title: Active Status List
description: Serialized list of active status IDs on this unit.

title: Status Stacks Map
description: Serialized key or value map of status stack counts.

title: Status Duration Map
description: Serialized key or value map of remaining turn durations.

title: Guard Value
description: Flat damage prevention from Guard-family effects.

title: Exposed Value
description: Flat damage amplification from Expose-family effects.

title: Staggered
description: Restricts AP or card options while active.

title: Overheat Stacks
description: Heat pressure tracker for machine-intensive actions.

title: Marked Target
description: Unit is marked for focused interactions.

title: Shield Temp HP
description: Temporary shield pool from shield keywords.
